commits: 91bb01d: fix(agent-settings): prevent polling from overwriting checkbox state during editing
summary: Issue #391 fix implemented. Added isEditing state flag to AgentSettingsPane.tsx to guard useEffect prop sync during intermediate checkbox states. Added selectedAgentsRef + array value comparison in WorktreeDetailRefactored.tsx to skip unnecessary setSelectedAgents when polling returns the same value. Updated existing test with isEditing=false annotation. Added 4 new test cases: T1 (isEditing guards prop overwrites), T2 (sync resumes after API success), T3 (revert + isEditing reset on API failure), T4 (revert + isEditing reset on network error). All 4255 tests pass. 0 TypeScript errors. 0 ESLint errors.
message: TDD implementation complete. All acceptance criteria met.
